commit_scope: Keep Android-to-Mac capability liveness real during backgrounded sensing and make the live-cycle projection name the remaining inactive-window floor.

commands: coord claim live-cycle-capability-liveness "Close capability_liveness_missing by adding Android foreground capability heartbeat and Mac witness merge proof."

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/pareto.fk form-stdlib/autoresearch-loop.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-carrier.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-emitter.fk form-stdlib/tests/real-mesh-training-emitter-band.fk
curl proof: POST rich /sense, POST capability heartbeat /sense, GET /state on http://127.0.0.1:18800
local_validation.notes: Android debug APK builds with the foreground capability heartbeat service. The Mac witness proof preserved mic/camera/GPU latest summaries after a heartbeat-only POST and returned present=true. The real mesh emitter proof reported projection capability_ready=1, observed=5, native_wins=1, growth_status=embodied, and only window_floor_missing at cycle level. Form proof output: fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables); 1 ok, 0 divergent.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No production deploy requested for this Android/Mac local carrier slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: After Android sharing starts, a foreground service keeps the Mac witness /sense liveness fresh with summary-only capability heartbeats while Activity mic/camera/GPU samplers pause in the background. Mac witnesses merge heartbeat-only packets into the latest rich summary instead of erasing active sensor evidence. The emitter can now clear capability_liveness_missing when the heartbeat is continuous.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Mac witness on http://127.0.0.1:18800 during proof
test_flows: POST rich sensor summary then heartbeat-only packet to /sense and confirm /state present=true with retained mic/camera/GPU summaries
Run real_mesh_training_emitters.sh against the live witness with native-teacher and world-growth receipts

phase_gate.gate: Capability liveness must be maintained by actual Android-to-Mac heartbeat traffic, not by bypassing witness present=false.
phase_gate.next: Install the rebuilt APK on the physical Android device, run the same emitter against the phone-driven witness, then add Whisper and large train/heldout roots for --require-active.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Native-teacher and world-growth receipts could be earned, but live-cycle projection still blocked on capability_liveness_missing when the Android app paused or the witness went stale.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: Android has a foreground summary-only capability heartbeat, Mac witnesses preserve rich summaries across heartbeat-only packets, and the real emitter proof clears capability_liveness_missing under a continuous heartbeat loop.
retuned_north_star: Mac and Android maintain continuous liveness without adb communication
full active training windows add Whisper, hundreds of MiB of train/heldout roots, and 10k labels
dashboard and route choice read the same Form-native world_model_live_cycle projection
